description.value:
Keyword: [Hindered] Effect: Ice has formed on skin and clothing, movement impaired. Movement speed: Halved. Clumsy condition active Recovery: Automatically ends after 1 minute. Can attempt [[/save type=fortitude]] at end of each turn to end early.

  • 1 success: Reduce condition to Numbed
  • 2 success: Remove all cold conditions

recovery.chatMessage: Make a [[/save type=fortitude]] to recover from Frosted
